core_skills: Python, C++, Go, Large-scale distributed systems, Data storage
skill_match_scores: Python:1.0, C++:0.0, Go:1.0, Large-scale distributed systems:0.0, Data storage:1.0
must_have_quals: 2+ years of relevant industry experience in addition to a Bachelor's Degree, Master's or PhD in Computer Science, Electrical Engineering, Computer Engineering, Robotics, or related field, Must have strong programming skills in Python, C++ or Go, You have experience in one or more of the following areas: large-scale distributed systems; data storage and processing systems; modern microservice architecture; machine learning, multithreading; x86 architecture; and software performance tuning and optimization, robotics software frameworks, different compute modalities (CPU, GPU, FPGA) etc
core_responsibilities: Build the simulator that allows us to develop and test our autonomous driving technology in a virtual setting, Work on the core simulator and simulation frameworks, sensor simulation, scenario generation, and solutions that combine real-world data with synthetic techniques, Collaborate closely with teams across Autonomy and AI Platform to allow us to simulate realistically and reliably at scale, Own fundamental services for entire engineering organizations, including a generic compute platform to host mission-critical workflows such as data processing and simulation, Manage storage for hundreds of PB of data and provide cloud infrastructure as IaaC which provisions and maintains all cloud resources, Provide tools such as build and CI/CD to make engineering work more efficient
job_summary: Nuro is a self-driving technology company focused on making autonomy accessible to all. They are looking for talented engineers to join their software team, with opportunities in areas such as Data Platform, Simulation, and Technical Infrastructure.
